meaning: adj.沦为殖民地前的,殖民地时期前的
examples: Set in precolonial Nigeria, "Things Fall Apart" portrays the story of a farmer, Okonkwo, who struggles to preserve his customs despite pressure from British colonizers.
This history is deeply precolonial, and we still have much to learn and simply can't do it without the documentation that is only there in Timbuktu.
